nasb.text: “Take this book of the law and place it beside the ark of the covenant of the Lord your God, that it may remain there as a witness against you.

esv.text: “Take this Book of the Law and put it by the side of the ark of the covenant of the Lord your God, that it may be there for a witness against you.

cnv.text: “你們要把這律法書，放在耶和華你們的　神的約櫃旁，可以在那裡作反對你們的見證，

ccb.text: “把这律法书放在你们的上帝耶和华的约柜旁，作为指控你们的证据。
